series_metadata.series_description: Documentation includes requests for public records, public records receipt and response log, and copies of specific records provided.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two years or until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later. ; Electronic: Retain for two years or until audited by the Ohio Auditor of State''s office and biennial audit report is released, whichever is later., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
